title: epipactis × gerbaudiorum
intro: Epipactis × gerbaudiorum, also known as Gerbaud's helleborine, is a rare and hybrid orchid species that is a cross between Epipactis helleborine and Epipactis microphylla. The medicinal properties of Epipactis × gerbaudiorum lie in its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and improving digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Epipactis × gerbaudiorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, but its preparation and use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to its rarity and potential toxicity.
